title: Pan Aroma Scent Crystals Lavender Garden/Pure Cotton/Patchouli & Musk Pack Of 3.
features: Lavender Garden - A soothing fragrance with top notes of lavender and orange , layered on a vanill base.
Pure Cotton - A crisp fragrance with notes of fresh flowers and blossom extracts.
Patchouli & Musk - A sweet fragrance with top notes of pacthouli and musk infused with white florals.
Pack Of 3 Lavender Garden / Pure Cotton / Patchouli & Musk
